channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This venture capital firm believes investing in climate is ‘Obvious’—and just raised another $360 million to prove it
item.description: When Obvious Ventures launched 12 years ago with a focus on “world positive” companies, the idea was a contrarian bet: that startups tackling climate,...

item.title: MacKenzie Scott says everyone should heed this book—if not read it
item.description: MacKenzie Scott helped build one of the most recognizable companies in modern history—all while writing her first novel. As Amazon scaled from a fledg...

item.title: Copenhagen wants to cement itself as a sustainable fashion mecca
item.description: Fashion weeks around the world are dominated by four main shows: New York, Paris, Milan, and London. But in 2020, Copenhagen Fashion Week (CPHFW) made...

item.title: Meta expands its already massive Louisiana data center project
item.description: Last week, my colleague Sharon Goldman learned that Meta has bought about 1,400 acres, next to its already massive 2,250-acre Hyperion AI data center ...

item.title: 12 Innovations Poised to Upend Business as We Know It in 2026
Some health care CEOs praise TrumpRx for empowering consumers to compare drug prices
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Here’s Why Smart People Get Fooled by Manipulators and Scam Artists
item.description: A clever TED Talk explains why they’re so effective.

item.title: Execs From American Eagle, PepsiCo, E.l.f. Beauty, and Hinge Reveal How They Stay Cool
item.description: Find out how six leaders stay connected with Generations Z and Alpha.

item.title: Singapore’s ST Engineering debuts the AirFish: A ‘ground effect’ craft that flies a few meters above the sea at up to 116 miles per hour
item.description: The AirFish isn't quite a boat, or a plane; instead, it harnesses the ground effect to reduce drag as it flies from Singapore to Batam in just 25 minu...

item.title: Why Arnold Schwarzenegger Says You Should Keep Your Full-Time Job When You Start Your Own Business
item.description: Because th longer you hold on to your full-time job, the more increase your options–and preserve your power to say ‘no.’

item.title: Machine-made snow at the Winter Olympics makes ski racing riskier
item.description: When viewers tune in to the 2026 Winter Olympics, they will see pristine, white slopes, groomed tracks, and athletes racing over snow-covered landscap...

item.title: Lyft introduces feature to help get teenagers out of the house: ‘The problems of 2026 are social isolation and too much screen time’
item.description: The rideshare app launched Lyft Teen on Monday allowing 13-to-17-year-olds to request rides on the app.

item.title: TikTok’s endless scroll is under threat in Europe
item.description: Time could be up for TikTok ’s metronomic For You feed, which pushes videos to users with clock-like accuracy. The endless scroll that defines the Tik...

item.title: A Pair of Huge New Studies Agree: 3 Tiny Lifestyle Changes Can Add Years to Your Life
item.description: Science says the smallest possible lifestyle changes really do make a difference to your health.

item.title: Don’t get comfortable with the global stock rally today: Goldman’s Panic Index is approaching ‘max fear’
item.description: Every time stocks take a dip in reaction to bad news, a relentless wave of buy-the-dippers has stepped up to send them back upward again.
